docstring: DESCRIBE THE DATA. THIS CAN BE A LENGTHY PARAGRAPH PERHAPS. NOT USED BY PIPELINE.
data_label: LABEL THE DATA. A SHORT UNIQUE LABEL. NOT USED BY PIPELINE.
data_version: VERSION, SUCH AS MATERIALIZATION FOR MICRONS OR WHATEVER VERSION SUITS YOUR DATA.

data_sizes.docstring: A tuple indicating: (1) Num bytes and (2) num records (i.e. table/CSV rows, etc.) in the data. Multiple data sizes are supported via Code Ocean data source names to facilitate development/debugging against smaller subsets of the data.

spatial_limit.docstring: EXAMPLE: Assume a limit of .5 synapses per cubic micron

id_column: CSV COLUMN INDICATING THE ANNOTATIONS' UNIQUE IDS

PROPERTY_LABEL.type: TYPE STRING AS INDICATED ON PREVIOUS LINE

point_annotation_config.docstring: The values specified in this object for pt_column_labels must indicate names in the 'spatial_pt_columns' object.

line_annotation_config.docstring: The values specified in this object for pt_column_labels must indicate names in the 'spatial_pt_columns' object.

polyline_annotation_config.docstring: The values specified in this object for pt_column_labels must indicate names in the 'spatial_pt_columns' object.

pipeline_config.docstring: All settings in this section are optional. This section can be completely empty if you wish. However, if you need to override any default pipeline configuration settings, they go here. See the pipeline documentation for a description of such options.
